title: Source-grounded skill proof
description: Schema for proof-of-source payloads that cite the exact upstream SKILL.md lines that back the declared activation, context, boundaries, workflow, and evidence. Provenance proofs MUST NOT be counted as runtime benchmark passes.

activation_conditions.description: Conditions under which the skill is expected to activate.

required_context.description: Contextual inputs the skill requires before it can safely run.

safe_boundaries.description: Operational boundaries inside which the skill is expected to stay.

workflow_steps.description: Ordered workflow steps declared by the skill.

proof_evidence.description: Line- or section-level citations into the upstream source backing each declared claim.
